## ExtraParams class

It emits a [ExtraParamsXEvents.ExtraParamsProvided](./x-components.extraparamsxevents.extraparamsprovided.md) with the values received as a prop.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class ExtraParams extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [storeExtraParams](./x-components.extraparams.storeextraparams.md) |  | Dictionary&lt;unknown&gt; | State extra params. Used to override the initial extra params. |
|  [values](./x-components.extraparams.values.md) |  | Dictionary&lt;unknown&gt; | (Required) A Dictionary where the keys are the extra param names and its values. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [mounted()](./x-components.extraparams.mounted.md) |  | Emits the initial extra params, overriding with the state extra params, just in case, those values were already set by XComponents initialization (url, plugin config, etc.). |
|  [render()](./x-components.extraparams.render.md) |  |  |
